title: Mutation of Contract Key Fields in State Updates
description: An update choice inadvertently modifies a field that forms part of the contract key, breaking lookup continuity.
recommendation: Avoid modifying fields that are part of the contract key during update choices unless specifically intending to rename the key.

oracle.description: Contract keys should generally remain invariant during updates.
oracle.static_signal: Creation of the same template type inside an update choice with key fields reassigned.
oracle.symbolic_property: forall u. executes(UpdateStatus, u) => key(u_post) == key(u_pre)
